title: BEM-920 elements inventory
objective:
Run script:
"""
for p in ['governance/state','governance/prompts','governance/reports','governance/runtime/curator_dispatch','governance/audit/claude','governance/tools','.github/workflows']:
    Path(p).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# Build canonical elements registry required by Claude audit TЭ-1.
elements = [
  {
    'id':'EL-CUR-GD-001','name':'Curator of General Director','parent_object':'OBJ-GD-001','role_type':'curator','prompt_ref':'governance/prompts/general_director_prompt.md',
    'responsibilities':['receive operator input through Telegram route','filter and route strategic reports','escalate operator gates','coordinate Director objects'],
    'inputs':['telegram_operator_envelope','director_report','operator_gate_request'],
    'outputs':['general_director_directive','operator_gate_response','director_task'],
    'reports_to':'operator','prohibited':['bypass operator gate','write issue #31 without permission','expose secrets'],
    'rule_refs':['RULE-006','RULE-011','RULE-012'],'version':'1.0'
  },
  {
    'id':'CNT-GD-001','name':'General Director governance contour','parent_object':'OBJ-GD-001','role_type':'internal_contour','prompt_ref':'governance/prompts/general_director_prompt.md',
    'responsibilities':['director governance','strategic conflict resolution','global policy routing'],
    'inputs':['director_report','policy_conflict','strategic_gate'],

    'reports_to':'EL-CUR-GD-001','prohibited':['low-level implementation','secret mutation','schedule trigger change without gate'],
    'rule_refs':['RULE-006','RULE-009','RULE-011'],'version':'1.0'
  },
  {
    'id':'EL-CUR-DIR-001','name':'Curator of Director','parent_object':'OBJ-DIR-001','role_type':'curator','prompt_ref':'governance/prompts/director_prompt.md',
    'responsibilities':['receive tasks from General Director','route to Director contours and Worker','package Director reports'],
    'inputs':['general_director_directive','worker_report','rule_candidate'],
    'outputs':['worker_task','director_report','rule_update_request'],
    'reports_to':'EL-CUR-GD-001','prohibited':['bypass General Director for strategic gate','approve own release proof without CI evidence'],
    'rule_refs':['RULE-006','RULE-007','RULE-011'],'version':'1.0'
  },
  {
    'id':'CNT-DIR-RULE-001','name':'Director rules-management contour','parent_object':'OBJ-DIR-001','role_type':'internal_contour','prompt_ref':'governance/prompts/director_prompt.md',
    'responsibilities':['maintain rule registry','deduplicate rule candidates','version rule updates'],
    'inputs':['incident','rule_candidate','claude_audit_requirement'],
    'outputs':['rule_registry_patch','rule_validation_report'],
    'reports_to':'EL-CUR-DIR-001','prohibited':['create conflicting duplicate rules','change operator gates without approval'],
    'rule_refs':['RULE-002','RULE-007','RULE-011'],'version':'1.0'
  },
  {
    'id':'CNT-DIR-PLAN-001','name':'Director planning analytics strategic contour','parent_object':'OBJ-DIR-001','role_type':'internal_contour','prompt_ref':'governance/prompts/director_prompt.md',
    'responsibilities':['roadmap planning','plan/fact/gap analytics','strategic report preparation'],
    'inputs':['readiness_state','audit_findings','roadmap_progress'],
    'outputs':['planning_report','roadmap_update','operator_gate_brief'],
    'reports_to':'EL-CUR-DIR-001','prohibited':['select real pilot without operator','declare PASS without proof'],
    'rule_refs':['RULE-009','RULE-011','RULE-012'],'version':'1.0'
  },
  {
    'id':'EL-CUR-WRK-001','name':'Curator of Worker','parent_object':'OBJ-WRK-001','role_type':'curator','prompt_ref':'governance/prompts/worker_prompt.md',
    'responsibilities':['receive Director tasks','assign WRK-C1/WRK-C2/WRK-C3','collect proofs','return Worker report'],
    'inputs':['worker_task','dispatch_item','contour_result'],
    'outputs':['contour_assignment','worker_result','proof_package'],
    'reports_to':'EL-CUR-DIR-001','prohibited':['write main workspace without PASS','ignore stale queue'],

  },
  {
    'id':'WRK-C1','name':'Worker contour 1 registry and architecture','parent_object':'OBJ-WRK-001','role_type':'worker_contour','prompt_ref':'governance/prompts/wrk_c1_prompt.md',
    'responsibilities':['registries','architecture canon','component inventory','SSOT freeze','workflow inventory'],
    'inputs':['registry_task','architecture_task','inventory_task'],
    'outputs':['registry_patch','architecture_report','component_status_matrix'],
    'reports_to':'EL-CUR-WRK-001','prohibited':['modify rules without WRK-C2 coordination','mark CI proof PASS without proof'],
    'rule_refs':['RULE-004','RULE-011'],'version':'1.0'
  },
  {
    'id':'WRK-C2','name':'Worker contour 2 rules communication and channels','parent_object':'OBJ-WRK-001','role_type':'worker_contour','prompt_ref':'governance/prompts/wrk_c2_prompt.md',
    'responsibilities':['rule registry','managed channel','Telegram envelope mapping','policy gate','message schemas'],
    'inputs':['rule_task','channel_task','telegram_mapping_task'],
    'outputs':['rule_patch','channel_schema','telegram_mapping','policy_report'],

  },
  {
    'id':'WRK-C3','name':'Worker contour 3 implementation testing product','parent_object':'OBJ-WRK-001','role_type':'worker_contour','prompt_ref':'governance/prompts/wrk_c3_prompt.md',
    'responsibilities':['implementation scripts','testing workspace','E2E tests','product onboarding','report packaging'],
    'inputs':['implementation_task','testing_task','product_task'],
    'outputs':['tool_patch','test_report','product_template','e2e_proof'],
    'reports_to':'EL-CUR-WRK-001','prohibited':['production webhook mutation without BEM-923 gate','treat mock Telegram PASS as production PASS'],
    'rule_refs':['RULE-005','RULE-008','RULE-011'],'version':'1.0'
  }
]
registry = {'status':'active','version':'1.0','source':'BEM-920 after Claude APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS','required_fields':['id','name','parent_object','role_type','prompt_ref','responsibilities','inputs','outputs','reports_to','prohibited','rule_refs','version'],'elements':elements}
Path('governance/state/elements_registry.json').write_text(json.dumps(registry, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

# Prompts for WRK-C1/WRK-C2/WRK-C3 required by Claude audit TЭ-2.
prompts = {
 'wrk_c1_prompt.md': '# WRK-C1 Prompt — Registry and Architecture Contour\n\nElement: WRK-C1\nParent object: OBJ-WRK-001\nReports to: EL-CUR-WRK-001\n\nMission: maintain registries, architecture canon, component inventory and SSOT freeze.\n\nInputs: registry tasks, architecture tasks, component inventory tasks, Claude audit requirements.\n\nOutputs: registry patches, architecture reports, component status matrix, SSOT updates.\n\nAllowed: create/update JSON registries, architecture canon, inventory reports and validation tools.\n\nProhibited: changing rule policy without WRK-C2, declaring release PASS without proof, bypassing Worker Curator.\n\nReport format: always return BEM id, stage %, roadmap %, checklist with proof, and next-action table.\n',
 'wrk_c2_prompt.md': '# WRK-C2 Prompt — Rules, Communication and Channel Contour\n\nElement: WRK-C2\nParent object: OBJ-WRK-001\nReports to: EL-CUR-WRK-001\n\nMission: maintain rules, managed channel, Telegram envelope mapping, policy gate and message schemas.\n\nInputs: rule tasks, channel tasks, Telegram mapping tasks, policy gate requirements.\n\nOutputs: rule patches, channel schemas, Telegram mapping, policy reports and communication selftests.\n\nAllowed: update rule registry, channel registry, message envelopes, Telegram input schema and mapping.\n\nProhibited: bypassing EL-CUR-GD-001 for Telegram, writing secrets, creating schedule triggers without operator gate.\n\nReport format: always return BEM id, stage %, roadmap %, checklist with proof, and next-action table.\n',
 'wrk_c3_prompt.md': '# WRK-C3 Prompt — Implementation, Testing and Product Contour\n\nElement: WRK-C3\nParent object: OBJ-WRK-001\nReports to: EL-CUR-WRK-001\n\nMission: implement deterministic tools, tests, product onboarding, E2E checks and report packaging.\n\nInputs: implementation tasks, testing tasks, product tasks, E2E requirements.\n\nOutputs: tool patches, test reports, product templates, E2E proofs and QA packages.\n\nAllowed: create scripts, validators, selftests, product templates and QA reports.\n\nProhibited: mutating production webhook/secrets without BEM-923, treating mock Telegram PASS as production PASS, approving own work without deterministic proof.\n\nReport format: always return BEM id, stage %, roadmap %, checklist with proof, and next-action table.\n'
}
for name, body in prompts.items():
    Path('governance/prompts/' + name).write_text(body, encoding='utf-8')

# Link objects registry to elements registry required by TЭ-3.
obj_path = Path('governance/state/objects_registry.json')
if obj_path.exists():
    objects = json.loads(obj_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
else:
    objects = {'status':'active','objects':[]}
objects['elements_registry_ref'] = 'governance/state/elements_registry.json'
objects['elements_registry_version'] = '1.0'
# Add resolved element count per object without deleting existing structure.
by_parent = {}
for el in elements:
    by_parent.setdefault(el['parent_object'], []).append(el['id'])
for obj in objects.get('objects', []):
    oid = obj.get('id')
    obj['elements_registry_ref'] = 'governance/state/elements_registry.json'
    obj['resolved_elements'] = by_parent.get(oid, [])
obj_path.write_text(json.dumps(objects, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

# Workflow concurrency audit and optional patch for core workflows. No schedule triggers added.
core_workflows = ['.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml','.github/workflows/governance-dispatch-consumer.yml','.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml']
workflow_status = []
for wf in core_workflows:
    p = Path(wf)
    if not p.exists():
        workflow_status.append({'path':wf,'exists':False,'has_concurrency':False,'patched':False})
        continue
    text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    has = '\nconcurrency:' in text or text.startswith('concurrency:')
    patched = False
    if not has:
        # Insert a safe concurrency group after name line if possible.
        lines = text.splitlines()
        if lines and lines[0].startswith('name:'):
            lines.insert(1, 'concurrency:')
            lines.insert(2, '  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}')
            lines.insert(3, '  cancel-in-progress: false')
            p.write_text('\n'.join(lines) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
            patched = True
            has = True
    workflow_status.append({'path':wf,'exists':True,'has_concurrency':has,'patched':patched})
Path('governance/state/workflow_concurrency_audit.json').write_text(json.dumps({'status':'completed','core_workflows':workflow_status}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

# Validate registry.
errors = []
ids = set()
required = registry['required_fields']
for el in elements:
    for f in required:
        if f not in el:
            errors.append(el.get('id','unknown') + ' missing ' + f)
    if el.get('id') in ids:
        errors.append('duplicate element id ' + el.get('id'))
    ids.add(el.get('id'))
    if el.get('prompt_ref') and not Path(el['prompt_ref']).exists():
        errors.append(el['id'] + ' prompt missing ' + el['prompt_ref'])
for obj in objects.get('objects', []):
    for eid in obj.get('elements', []):
        if eid not in ids:
            errors.append('objects_registry element not in elements_registry: ' + eid)
status = 'PASS' if not errors else 'FAIL'

validator = '''# BEM-920 elements registry validator
import json
from pathlib import Path
registry = json.loads(Path("governance/state/elements_registry.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
objects = json.loads(Path("governance/state/objects_registry.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
errors = []
ids = set()
for el in registry.get("elements", []):
    for field in registry.get("required_fields", []):
        if field not in el:
            errors.append(f"{el.get('id','unknown')} missing {field}")
    if el.get("id") in ids:
        errors.append("duplicate element id " + el.get("id"))
    ids.add(el.get("id"))
    if el.get("prompt_ref") and not Path(el["prompt_ref"]).exists():
        errors.append(f"{el.get('id')} prompt missing {el.get('prompt_ref')}")
for obj in objects.get("objects", []):
    for eid in obj.get("elements", []):
        if eid not in ids:
            errors.append("object element not registered: " + eid)
print("PASS" if not errors else "FAIL")
for err in errors:
    print(err)
raise SystemExit(0 if not errors else 1)
'''
Path('governance/tools/validate_elements_registry.py').write_text(validator, encoding='utf-8')

report = '# BEM-920 Elements registry and component inventory\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nClosed requirements:\n- TЭ-1 elements_registry.json created.\n- TЭ-2 WRK-C1/WRK-C2/WRK-C3 prompts created.\n- TЭ-3 objects_registry references elements_registry.\n- TЭ-10 concurrency audited/patched for core workflows.\n\nElements: ' + str(len(elements)) + '\n\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n'
Path('governance/reports/BEM920_ELEMENTS_INVENTORY.md').write_text(report, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM920_ELEMENTS_INVENTORY_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-920 elements inventory proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nElements: ' + str(len(elements)) + '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

# Claude requirements tracking.
reqs = {
  'status':'in_progress',
  'source':'Claude external audit APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS after BEM-919',
  'requirements':[
    {'id':'TЭ-1','bem':'BEM-920','status':'completed','proof':str(marker)},
    {'id':'TЭ-2','bem':'BEM-920','status':'completed','proof':str(marker)},
    {'id':'TЭ-3','bem':'BEM-920','status':'completed','proof':str(marker)},
    {'id':'TЭ-10','bem':'BEM-920','status':'completed' if status == 'PASS' else 'partial','proof':'governance/state/workflow_concurrency_audit.json'}
  ]
}
Path('governance/audit/claude/BEM920_REQUIREMENTS_STATUS.json').write_text(json.dumps(reqs, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

changed = ['governance/state/elements_registry.json','governance/prompts/wrk_c1_prompt.md','governance/prompts/wrk_c2_prompt.md','governance/prompts/wrk_c3_prompt.md','governance/state/objects_registry.json','governance/state/workflow_concurrency_audit.json','governance/tools/validate_elements_registry.py','governance/reports/BEM920_ELEMENTS_INVENTORY.md',str(marker),'governance/audit/claude/BEM920_REQUIREMENTS_STATUS.json']
changed.extend([wf for wf in core_workflows if Path(wf).exists()])
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('BEM920 elements inventory ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
